query:
_index=sumologic_volume 
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as collector, dataTier, bytes, count
| where _sourceCategory matches "collector_and_tier_volume" and dataTier="Flex"
| bytes/1024/1024 as mbytes
| timeslice 6h
| sum(mbytes) as mbytes by _timeslice
| predict mbytes by 6h model=ar, forecast=20

sources.dashboardDescription: The Logs dashboard helps you see your log ingest volume between default and non-default indexes along with the predicted growth. This dashboard also provides predicted growth for scan volume.
